LEGO Antarctic research icebreaker tilts violently as killer-whale pod breaches beneath hull, minifigure biologist tumbling across brick-deck, equipment sliding overboard, radio-antenna snapping, southern-lights shimmering overhead.

LEGO motorcyclist jumps exploding brick-gas-station, minifigure mid-air over fireball, leather-jacket flapping, pursuing gang-members shielding faces, pump-islands fragmenting, downtown skyline silhouetted against orange inferno.

LEGO dragon-slayer slides beneath wyrm's flame-breath inside brick-throne-room, minifigure's armor scorching, tapestries igniting, marble columns melting, treasure-hoard scattering, crystal chandelier crashing down burning.

LEGO frontier-cavalry charges through brick-fort gates as Comanche warriors counter-attack, minifigure bugler mid-note, arrows streaking, cannon overturned, palisade-logs splintering, dust-devils swirling through gunsmoke.

LEGO deep-space mining-rig explodes as asteroid-swarm impacts, minifigure engineers evacuating through airlock-tunnel, brick-refinery modules tearing apart, ore-containers tumbling into void, planetary-rings glowing behind catastrophic debris-field.

LEGO Renaissance duelists cross rapiers on rain-slicked brick-bridge, minifigure seconds holding cloaks, canal gondola capsizing below from dropped lantern, palazzo-windows reflecting lightning, cobblestones slick with spreading blood.

LEGO bomber's ball-turret gunner fires at pursuing Messerschmitt, minifigure tracers streaming past shattered canopy, brick-fuselage holed, engine trailing fire, formation bombers visible through cloud-break, flak bursting everywhere.

LEGO Bedouin caravan scatters as sandstorm-wall engulfs brick-oasis, minifigure merchants clutching flapping-robes, camels stampeding, palm-fronds shredding, ancient well collapsing inward, dunes reshaping violently overhead.
LEGO pirate captain duels rival on splitting deck as kraken drags galleon under, minifigures sword-locked mid-lunge, treasure chest sliding overboard, mast snapping, crew abandoning ship.
LEGO astronaut repairs satellite as solar flare erupts behind, minifigure's tether snapping loose, brick space-debris field approaching, tool-bag spinning away, Earth limb glowing below.
LEGO dragon swoops through brick castle courtyard snatching fleeing knight mid-flight, towers crumbling from tail-sweep, minifigure archers firing upward, drawbridge chains snapping, moat boiling.

LEGO getaway motorcycle weaves between exploding brick police-barriers, minifigure rider leaning hard, sidecar-passenger throwing spike-strip, downtown storefronts shattering, helicopter spotlight tracking overhead.
LEGO explorer swings across temple chasm on vine as idol-pedestal erupts poisoned darts, minifigure's fedora pierced mid-flight, brick bridge collapsing behind, golden artifact clutched desperately.
LEGO ninjas clash katanas atop speeding bullet-train roof, minifigures balanced mid-strike, wind tearing scarves, tunnel approaching fast, Mount Fuji backdrop, sparks showering from blade-contact.

LEGO scientist flees erupting laboratory as chemical vats explode rainbow-colored, minifigure coat-tails smoking, brick fume-hood fragmenting, periodic table poster igniting, ceiling beams collapsing inward.

LEGO deep-sea diver confronts giant squid beside sunken aircraft-carrier, minifigure spear-gun firing, brick coral-encrusted deck tilting, treasure spilling from cargo-hold, bioluminescent jellyfish swarm approaching.
LEGO sherpa guides rope-bridge evacuation as ice-cliff fractures behind, minifigure yak stumbling, brick prayer-flags shredding in wind, monastery visible across gorge, crevasse widening beneath.
LEGO gladiator leaps from crashing chariot as opponent's wheels tangle, minifigures airborne mid-collision, brick-arena sand erupting, emperor standing at rail, lions released from gates.

LEGO jouster's lance shatters opponent's shield mid-collision, brick-splinters exploding, minifigure horses rearing violently, tournament-tent collapsing from impact shockwave, squire diving desperately, pennants whipping overhead.

LEGO gunslinger draws pistol as rival's bullet shatters whiskey-bottle behind, minifigure saloon-doors swinging wildly, brick-boardwalk splintering, tumbleweeds freezing mid-roll, undertaker watching from window.

LEGO archaeologist's torch illuminates unwrapping mummy lurching forward, minifigure stumbling backward, brick-sarcophagus lid crashing down, scarab-beetles pouring from hieroglyphic walls, golden death-mask gleaming ominously.

LEGO bandits vault between locomotive cars as bridge ahead collapses, minifigure conductor wrestling controls desperately, brick-coal tender separating, canyon river visible through disintegrating trestle.

LEGO landing-craft door drops on alien moon, minifigure astronauts charging down ramp, brick-dust billowing purple, strange crystalline spires looming, mothership departing overhead through twin-sun sky.

LEGO pirate raises cutlass in glittering cavern as skeletal-guardian advances, minifigure torch illuminating gold-brick mountains, jeweled-crown rolling toward underground-waterfall, stalactites fracturing from battle-clash.

LEGO mech pilot ejects as cockpit explodes from rival's brick-rocket impact, minifigure tumbling through downtown-debris, skyscraper collapsing sideways, sparking hydraulic-fluid raining, parachute deploying mid-fireball.

LEGO safari-photographer slides beneath charging elephant-herd, minifigure camera flying loose, brick-watering-hole erupting stampede-spray, acacia-trees toppling, terrified gazelle-bricks scattering through dust-storm.

LEGO lighthouse-keeper battles brick-railing as tsunami-wave towers overhead, minifigure lantern extinguishing, glass-room shattering, distress-flare arcing desperately, fishing-boat visible spinning in green wall.

LEGO aquarium-worker swept into tank as orca breaches glass-wall, minifigure tumbling through brick-water explosion, feeding-bucket flying, screaming visitor-minifigures fleeing cascading flood, dolphin escaping through lobby.

LEGO hang-glider crashes through barn roof mid-storm, minifigure pilot tangled in frame, brick-hay bales exploding, lightning striking weathervane, panicked horse rearing, wind shredding fabric-wings.

LEGO Roman war-elephant tramples barbarian shield-wall, minifigure mahout hurling javelins, brick-palisade splintering beneath tusks, howdah-tower ablaze, Germanic warriors scattering through forest smoke.

LEGO mobster's Tommy-gun riddled car flips during bridge-chase, minifigure gangster ejecting through windshield, brick-guardrail exploding, fedora spinning away, pursuing Model-T swerving desperately beneath.

LEGO ironclad warship's turret explodes as Confederate ram strikes amidships, minifigure sailors abandoning brick-deck, smoke-stack toppling, paddle-wheel fragmenting, river current dragging wreckage downstream.

LEGO spelunker rappels into glowing crystal-cavern as rope frays, minifigure headlamp illuminating massive geode-walls, ancient brick-ruins visible below, bats erupting upward, stalactite crashing past desperately.

LEGO witch's broomstick shatters against cathedral brick-spire during midnight pursuit, minifigure tumbling through gargoyle-cluster, spell-book pages scattering, full-moon silhouetting hunter's crossbow-bolt streaking past.

LEGO coal-mine cart derails at collapsed-tunnel junction, minifigure miners thrown into chasm, brick-support beams snapping overhead, lantern-oil igniting methane-pocket, pickaxes tumbling into black abyss.

LEGO Cossack horseman leaps brick-trench mid-saber-slash, minifigure Napoleonic-soldier raising bayonet, snow-covered battlefield littered cannons, regimental-colors burning, winter-forest obscured by musket-smoke.

LEGO test-submarine implodes at crushing-depth, minifigure engineer's face pressed against cracking porthole, brick-pressure-hull buckling inward, instrument-panels exploding, bioluminescent creatures circling dying vessel.

LEGO Pharaoh's brick-chariot races past crumbling Sphinx as plague-locusts darken sky, minifigure slaves fleeing pyramid-construction, overseer's whip tangling chariot-wheel, Nile flooding blood-red behind.
